name: Force Dark Mode
description: Applies a dark mode filter to all websites using CSS inversion, with exclusions for images, videos, and other media to keep them looking correct

rules.css: html { filter: invert(1) hue-rotate(180deg) !important; background-color: #111 !important; } img, video, picture, canvas, svg image, [style*="background-image"], .emoji, iframe { filter: invert(1) hue-rotate(180deg) !important; }
img[src$=".svg"] { filter: invert(1) hue-rotate(180deg) !important; } pre, code { filter: none !important; background-color: #1e1e1e !important; color: #d4d4d4 !important; }
